title: 2PCS Sliding Door Hardware Kit Barn Door Soft Close Mechanism Spring Buffer Damper Upgraded Hole-Free Version for Door Weight 70-160 Pounds Adjustable Door Stoppers, Actuator Spacers
features: Quiet: Barn door soft closing damper can slow down the speed of the door. Prevent violent slamming, which can operate the sliding door more quietly and smoothly

Keep closed: Barn door hardware stopper, which is hidden behind the track, can slow down the speed of the door, making the barn door softly stop in the final position, opening and closing the barn door becomes effortless.
Widely applicable: Barn door hardware system designed for flat tracks, cannot be used for round tracks. Each soft closing device is suitable for doors weighing 88-132 pounds.
Easy to install: Barn door hardware stopper adopts the latest buffer closing design, and no drilling is required on the track.

Package Contents: 2 soft closing devices, 4 S-hooks, 2 actuators, 8 screws, hex wrench. Installing our barn door soft closing device is a simple process. The package contains all necessary hardware and step-by-step instructions, which is convenient for DIY enthusiasts and professionals.
